# CVPixelFormatType

**Structure**

Identifier for a pixel format type

## Declaration

```swift
struct CVPixelFormatType
```

## Instance Properties

- **isCompressionAvailable**: True if any of the planes of this format are compressed and hardware support is available.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
